files.patch:
@@ -42,0 +42,6 @@
+// HWCAP_PACA was introduced in glibc 2.30
+// https://sourceware.org/git/?p=glibc.git;a=commit;h=a2e57f89a35e6056c9488428e68c4889e114ef71
+#if defined(__aarch64__) && !defined(HWCAP_PACA)
+HWCAP_PACA (1 << 30)
+#endif
+

@@ -41,0 +41,7 @@
+
+// HWCAP_PACA was introduced in glibc 2.30
+// https://sourceware.org/git/?p=glibc.git;a=commit;h=a2e57f89a35e6056c9488428e68c4889e114ef71
+#if defined(__aarch64__) && !defined(HWCAP_PACA)
+HWCAP_PACA (1 << 30)
+#endif
+
